policy_evaluation.name: Policy Evaluation (Quasi-Experimental)
policy_evaluation.description: Intake → Identification Strategy → Estimation → Robustness Checks

branching.then: halt — cannot use DiD

systematic_review.name: Systematic Review
systematic_review.description: Intake → deep literature → synthesize → report → audit

loop_points.trigger: gaps found in literature coverage or synthesis needs refinement

options.literature_compare: search for additional papers in gap areas

after_iteration: return to literature_deep with expanded search

branching.then: halt — too few papers for systematic review
run research_iterate → return to literature_deep or compile_outputs

notes: Use research_iterate to refine search strategy or synthesis approach.

genomics_pipeline.name: Genomics Analysis Pipeline
genomics_pipeline.description: Intake FASTQ → QC → Alignment → Differential Expression → Audit

branching.then: halt — data failed QC thresholds

causal_investigation.name: Causal Investigation
causal_investigation.description: Intake → literature → route → data → causal analysis → audit with causal language check

options.method_switch: try different identification strategy (IV, DiD, RDD, matching)

after_iteration: return to method_route with new strategy
downgrade to associational if no strategy works

loop_points.trigger: refutation tests failed or results unexpected
after_iteration: return to execute_analysis with new method
downgrade to associational if causal claim unsupported

branching.then: halt — causal inference not possible with this data
report as associational, not causal
run research_iterate → return to execute_analysis or compile_outputs

notes: Use research_iterate to explore alternative identification strategies.
If causal claim fails, document why in docs/dead_ends/.

quick_exploratory.name: Quick Exploratory
quick_exploratory.description: Intake → route → data → analysis → report. Skips deep literature and audit.

zero_shot_path.notes: Zero-shot path runs ONLY when user query matches trigger phrases. Skips the full pipeline and delivers immediate descriptive results with one auto-selected visualization. Does NOT generate a manuscript.

quality_gates.on_fail: halt — fix failed checks before proceeding

loop_points.trigger: user requests investigation, method change, or exploration

options.investigate: why did we get this result?

options.explore: what else is in the data?

after_iteration: return to execute_analysis with new method

branching.then: halt — see follow_up_questions.md
label as exploratory only
run research_iterate → return to execute_analysis or compile_outputs

notes: Results are preliminary. Run audit_validate before formal use.
Use research_iterate at any point to explore, pivot, or investigate.
Quality gates checked between phases — run 'research validate <phase>'

clinical_trial_analysis.name: Clinical Trial Analysis (SAP driven)
clinical_trial_analysis.description: Intake → SAP Design → Stratification → Survival Analysis → Compliance Audit

branching.then: halt — analysis deviated from preregistered SAP

full_publication.name: Full Publication
full_publication.description: Intake → literature → route → data → analysis → manuscript → audit

quality_gates.on_fail: halt — fix failed checks before proceeding
expand literature search or document why minimum not met
revise analysis plan — each question needs a valid method
complete pre-registration before proceeding to analysis
fix data pipeline — ensure lineage is recorded
complete analysis for all questions before proceeding
address critical reviewer2 findings or add to limitations

actions.description: Re-run analysis with strict train/test separation
Add identified confounders as control variables
Compute confidence intervals and effect sizes

loop_points.trigger: literature reveals gap in analysis plan
after_iteration: return to method_route with updated plan

loop_points.trigger: user requests investigation, method change, or robustness check

options.investigate: why did we get this result?

after_iteration: return to execute_analysis with new method

branching.then: halt — see follow_up_questions.md
proceed — review follow_up_questions.md
timestamp and lock pre-registration — no method changes allowed without documented deviation
report null finding honestly
run research_iterate → return to execute_analysis or compile_outputs
remediate and re-run audit
run research_iterate with type 'robustness' to address issues, then re-run reviewer2
add issues to limitations section, proceed with audit

feedback.when: assumption violation not in analysis plan

notes: Use research_iterate at any point to explore, pivot, or investigate.
All iterations are documented in docs/iterations/ — never deleted.
Null findings are reported with the same detail as significant results.
Quality gates are checked between every phase — run 'research validate <phase>'
Data lineage is recorded in docs/data_lineage.json — required for reproducibility
Lifecycle hooks: pre_routing, pre_execution, post_execution, pre_ledger_commit, on_failure
See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for hook system details

financial_backtesting.name: Financial Strategy Backtesting
financial_backtesting.description: Intake prices → Strategy Design → Walk-Forward Validation → Risk Audit

branching.then: halt — strategy is overfit, fail validation

predictive_modeling.name: Predictive Modeling
predictive_modeling.description: Intake → route → data → ML pipeline → report → audit

loop_points.trigger: model performance needs improvement or user wants to explore alternatives
after_iteration: return to execute_analysis with new model
proceed to compile_outputs if performance adequate

branching.then: report train vs test performance honestly
run research_iterate → return to execute_analysis or compile_outputs

notes: Always use train/test split or cross-validation.
Use research_iterate to explore models, features, and hyperparameters.
Document all model attempts in docs/iterations/ — including failed ones.

categories.description: Genomics, transcriptomics, and related omics workflows
Cheminformatics, molecular simulation, and quantum chemistry
Psychology, social science, and behavioral research

tools.citation: Van der Auwera et al., Curr Protoc Bioinformatics 2013.
tools.notes: Java-based; typically run in container or conda env.

tools.invocation: salmon quant -i index -l A -1 R1.fq.gz -2 R2.fq.gz -o quant

tools.notes: Alternative to DESeq2 for small N.

tools.citation: Eastman et al., PLoS Comput Biol 2017.
Bates et al., J Stat Software 2015.
Ong et al., Comput Mater Sci 2013.
Hjorth Larsen et al., J Phys Condens Matter 2017.
